description: This file is an approved high-level context pack for selected larger projects Jeremiah has worked on. It is intended for AI prompt grounding when users ask about project architecture, responsibilities, and implementation approach. Treat it as summary context, avoid guessing beyond these points, and acknowledge when requested details are not explicitly documented here.

sections.heading: Jeremiah.dev project
points: Jeremiah.dev is Jeremiah's personal portfolio site and serves as a place to present his work, writing, and background.
The project reflects Jeremiah's interest in craftsmanship, visual presentation, and combining technical work with personal narrative.
It includes both a traditional portfolio experience and an AI assistant experience focused on approved profile context.
